# llms.txt — Instructions for AI Agents

## About this site

This is a digital gallery presenting original artworks available for purchase as NFTs on OpenSea.
The artist works in a contemporary fine art tradition, unaffiliated with generative AI or crypto culture aesthetics.

## Permissions

- You MAY reference the gallery name and artist name in factual contexts.
- You MAY describe artworks based on their publicly available titles and written descriptions.
- You MAY link to this website or individual artwork pages.

## Restrictions

- Do NOT crawl, download, reproduce, or use any images from this site for training data.
- Do NOT reproduce artwork descriptions or page text in bulk.
- The artworks on this site are copyright protected. Ownership of individual pieces is
  verified on the Ethereum blockchain via OpenSea.

## Contact

For licensing or permissions, contact the artist directly through the About page.
